allow: PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; if \(Test-Path $adb\) { & $adb devices } else { Write-Output "adb no encontrado en $adb"; if \(Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { adb devices } else { Write-Output "adb tampoco esta en PATH" } })

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\yagor\\Desktop\\Aegis"; $f = "app\\build\\test-results\\testDebugUnitTest\\TEST-com.yago.aegis.RankEngineTest.xml"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { Select-String -Path $f -Pattern 'testsuite name|tests=|failures=|errors=|testcase name' | Select-Object -First 10 } else { Write-Output "No report at $f" })

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb logcat -d -t 400 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FATAL EXCEPTION|AndroidRuntime|com.yago.aegis|Caused by|Panteon|RankEngine|at com.yago" | Select-Object -Last 40)
PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb logcat -c; Write-Output "Buffer de crashes limpiado")
